# meok-eu-ai-act-art-13-ifu-mcp

> MEOK EU AI Act Article 13 Instructions for Use generator — provider-side IFU with 7 mandatory Art 13(3) elements + Art 14 oversight design + FRIA crosswalk. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- generate_ifu
- check_ifu_completeness
- list_art_13_3_elements
- list_art_14_oversight_measures
- crosswalk_to_fria
- generate_human_oversight_section
- sign_ifu_chain

## Install
```
pip install meok-eu-ai-act-art-13-ifu-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-eu-ai-act-art-13-ifu-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
